div.head: The Ambassador in Chile (Bowers) to the Secretary of State
div.p: A–462. For Foreign Economic Administration. Reference Department’s circular airgram May 25, 11:15 a.m.Not printed. and Embassy’s telegrams 995, June 8, 2 p.m. and 1037, June 15, 11 a.m.Latter not printed.

The Country Agency has officially expressed its concurrence to the decentralization rollback to a minimum positive list of commodities which will require import recommendations effective July 1, 1944.

In regard to the positive list, the Country Agency has asked the Embassy whether the quota to be assigned to Chile of the commodities not included in the positive list will be made known to the Country Agency. The Embassy would appreciate being informed of the procedure to be followed in this respect in order that this information may be transmitted to the Country Agency.
